basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central salt and marine chemical research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) Project Associate-I (PAT-I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR CSMCRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I (PAT-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per CSIR Rules

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university

salary_details.details: Rs. 25000 - 31000 Per Month (31000 + HRA or 25000 + HRA)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I (PAT-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR CSMCRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I (PAT-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I (PAT-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I (PAT-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I (PAT-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a university recognized by the government to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I (PAT-I) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate-I (PAT-I) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per CSIR rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I (PAT-I) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I (PAT-I) vacancy?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. Prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I (PAT-I) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I (PAT-I) is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CSMCRI is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with the pincode 364002. This is the base location for the institute and the project.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any specific experience required?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention specific years of experience required. However, it is advisable to include any relevant experience in your application bio-data.
